name: wmv-default
style: Editorial, brand-forward. Dark, line grid, lime+lavender accents.

slides.description: Eyebrow + 3-line headline + subtitle. Lime accent on payoff line.
Icon + label + problem statement + lavender-framed stat chip.
Lavender gradient-border idea card with name, pitch, meta pills, stack chips.
Large quote-style insight; accent words in lime. Byline line underneath.
Section headline + 3-5 numbered step rows; step numbers in lime.
Testimonial on aubergine panel with lavender/mint gradient avatar.
Eyebrow + 2-line headline (accent word in lime) + button (lime bg) + URL.
